The American Federation of Labor has been holding
its 9th annual convention at jamestown. President
Gompers defined it's attitude when he said at the opening
session:


Labor today stands erect looking the world in the
face insisting upon equal treatment equal opportunity,
and resenting any attempt at injustice or wrong"


Has organized labor made mistakes? So has govern
ment. SO has religion Even civilization and human
progress have known what it to falter the way.

Of the bridges which spanning the great chasm
